description: User hovers over various search results on the Google search page while scanning for options.
frame_description: Google search results page for 'home loans comparison' showing sponsored ads and organic results.

description: User hovers over the first sponsored search result for Unloan, considering the 5.10% comparison rate.
interaction_target: 5.10% p.a. Comparison Rate | Low Rate Home Loan From Unloan
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the title link of the Unloan sponsored advertisement.

description: User clicks on the Unloan sponsored link to visit their website.
interaction_target: 5.10% p.a. Comparison Rate | Low Rate Home Loan From Unloan
frame_description: The link is activated as the user clicks to navigate.

description: The browser navigates from Google search results to the Unloan homepage.
page_title: Unloan | Home loans for Australians who love to save
frame_description: The screen transitions from Google to the Unloan website, which features a dark theme and large text.

description: User scrolls down the Unloan homepage to view different loan products and interest rates.
page_title: Unloan | Home loans for Australians who love to save
frame_description: The page moves vertically, revealing 'Live in' and 'Invest' loan options with their respective rates.

description: User hovers over the 'Apply now' button for the 'Live in' loan option while reading the details.
page_title: Unloan | Home loans for Australians who love to save
frame_description: The cursor rests on the 'Apply now' button within the 'Live in' loan card.

description: User scrolls further down the page to explore more features, awards, and the home loan calculator.
page_title: Unloan | Home loans for Australians who love to save
frame_description: The user scrolls past award badges and a section titled 'A new kind of home loan' down to 'Crunch the numbers'.

description: User briefly hovers over the 'Savings' tab in the calculator section.
page_title: Unloan | Home loans for Australians who love to save
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'Savings' tab of the interactive calculator.

description: User scrolls down to the FAQ section at the bottom of the Unloan homepage.
page_title: Unloan | Home loans for Australians who love to save
frame_description: The page scrolls down to a section titled 'In case you missed anything' containing several accordion-style questions.

description: User switches browser tabs to review the study task instructions.
frame_description: The view switches to a white page with text detailing the user testing tasks.

description: User switches browser tabs back to the Unloan website.
page_title: Unloan | Home loans for Australians who love to save
frame_description: The view returns to the Unloan FAQ section.

description: User navigates back to the Google search results page.
frame_description: The browser returns to the previous Google search results page.

description: User hovers over the Google search bar, possibly considering a new search query.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned inside the search input field at the top of the Google page.

description: User scrolls down the Google search results to find another lender to compare.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the Unloan ad to see other results like Lendi and ubank.

description: User clicks on the Lendi search result link.
interaction_target: Top 20 Home Loan Rates 2026 | Compare Your Best Options Now

description: The browser navigates from Google to the Lendi website.

description: A loading screen appears as the Lendi page content is being fetched.

description: The Lendi onboarding form loads, presenting the first question to the user.
